# Cantonese National Language Script
# Cantonese Dictionary in National Language Script
# Author: Vòng Vân Hạu
# First Published: 2026-06-26
# Version: 2026-06-26
# The orthography in this dictionary is based on typical Canton city or Hong Kong accent Cantonese.

一件還一件 {dât kiện vàn dât kiện} /a different matter | don't mix another incident with this one/
一不小心 {dât bât siểu sâm} /Accidentally/
一世人 {dât sế dần} /the whole life (of a person); one's entire life; for a lifetime/
一世英名 {dât sế dinh mình} /one's great reputation and fame/
一个 {dât có} /One;a | an/
一串 {dât xuyến} /a series of/
一九九七年 {dât cẩu cẩu xât niền} /Year 1997/
一九四九年 {dât cẩu sý cẩu niền} /Year 1949/
一事 {dât sị} /A matter/
一二 {dât dị} /one or two, a little, a few, one by one/
一些些 {dât se se} /A little bit/
一人做事一人當 {dât dần chộ sị dât dần đong} /One must bear the consequences of his own act/
一人計短，二人計長 {dât dần kế đuyển dị dần kế chưởng} /two minds are better than one/
一仆一碌 {dât puc dât luc} /stumbling to the ground rolling and crawling; running away in such a hurry that one is almost falling over/
一介 {dât kái} /just a kind (of person)/
一代英豪 {dât đọi dinh hồ} /hero of the era/
一代豪傑 {dât đọi hồ kiệt} /hero of the era/
一件頭 {dât kiện thầu} /one-piece (swimwear)/
一任 {dât dậm} /Allow; let (somebody do as he pleases); A term/
一份 {dât phận} /a portion/
一住 {dât chự} /Live in/
一來到 {dât lề đố} /When one's first got here/
一便 {dât biện} /aside, while/
一係 {dât hệ} /(conjunction) neither; either or also; or, used when you want to make a suggestion, similar to the meaning of "what about…?" | "how about…"/
一個 {dât có} /a; one/
一個一個 {dât có dât có} /each by each; one follow another/
一個二個 {dât có dị có} /one and two, each and every one/
一個做好，一個做醜 {dât có chộ hổ ，dat có chộ xẩu} /one plays the good guy, the other plays the bad/
一個字 {dât có chị} /one character | five minutes (spoken)/
一個對 {dât có đúi} /one thing which, one person who/
一個崩 {dât có băng} /a coin (a dollar, a cent)/
一個巴仙 {dât có percent(ba-sin)} /One percent;1%/
一個鐘 {dât có chung} /One Hour/
一個餅印 {dât có bểnh dấn} /a biscuit imprint, which means two people look really alike, usually refers members of the same family/
一個餅印噉 {dât có bểnh dấn cẩm} /lit. look identical as from the same mold, meaning one share the same looks as another/
一個骨 {dât có quât} /15 minutes; quarter-hour; literal meaning: a piece of bone; Cantonese slang, derived from the English word 'quarter', the pronunciation of 'quart' sounds similar to the Cantonese pronunciation of '骨' (gwat1)/
一倍 {dât pỗi} /100% more; double; twice/
一億 {dât dich} /One hundred million/
一元化 {dât duyền phá} /Unified/
一元復始 {dât duyền phục xỉ} /New year, new start/
一元方程 {dât duyền phong xình} /Quadratic Equation/
一兆 {dât siệu} /one trillion/
一共 {dât cụng} /(adverb) 1. the sum of; 2. in total/
一凹一凸 {dât nâp dât đật} /lit. one who protrudes, one who caves in, meaning compatible/
一分 {dât phân} /One minute | point | cent/
一分一秒 {dât phân dât miễu} /as time (goes by)/
一分錢 {dât phân xiền} /what you pay (what you get)/
一刻 {dât hach} /A moment;A quarter/
一動不如一靜 {dât đụng bât dừ dât chịnh} /lit. one move is not as good as standing still, meaning not to take action until one can clarify if any moves are of any value/
一十 {dât sập} /The whole thing/
一千 {dât xiên} /one thousand/
一去不返 {dât húi bât phản} /never come back after leaving/
一口價 {dât hẩu ká} /last or final bid of the bargaining or negotiation (normally used in negotiating the price of buying or purchasing something)/
一口煙 {dât hẩu diên} /a puff of smoke or cigarette/
一句講晒 {dât cúi cỏng sái} /finish in one sentence (spoken)/
一句鐘 {dât cúi chung} /One hour/
一向 {dât hướng} /(verb) have been…/
一向都 {dât hướng đô} /had always/
一味 {dât mỵ} /(noun) 1. single dish; 2. single interest/
一哥 {dât co} /(slang) a leader or a chief of a group; often specifically a reference to the Commissioner of Police in Hong Kong, who is the head of the Hong Kong Police Force; a term to describe someone who is the most capable or particularly talented within a specific field/
一唔係 {dât m̀ hệ} /else/
一啖砂糖一啖屎 {dât đạm sa thòng dât đạm sỉ} /lit. one mouthful of sugar, follow by a mouthful of shit; meaning good things follow by the bad, switching alternately/
一啲 {dât ti} /a bit/
一啲啲 {dât ti ti} /a little bit (spoken)/
一嘢 {dât dẽ} /one hit or strike/
一嚿嘢 {dât cậu dẽ} /a blob of (thing)/
一嚿水 {dât cậu sủi} /a hundred dollars/
一嚿溜 {dât cậu liêu} /One ball of (something)/
一嚿雲 {dât cậu vần} /lit. a piece of cloud, meaning confused or lost in thoughts/
一嚿飯 {dât cậu phạn} /idiot; foolish (slang)/
一嚿飯噉 {dât cậu phạn cẩm} /lit. a lump of rice, meaning one who is slow in reaction/
一回 {dât vồi} /one round, one time/
一國三公 {dât quóc sam cung} /A state with three rulers – divided leadership – the power being not unified/
一國之君 {dât quóc chi quân} /A King | President | Prime Minister | (the highest title) of the country/
一團 {dât thuyền} /a group/
一坺 {dât pẹt} /Uses to describe something sticky such as dirt, starch paste/
一坺迾 {dât pạt lạt} /lit. one pile of mud, meaning one who refuses to take any actions or make a living/
一場 {dât xường} /one round or an event, such as a round of game, a dream, or a speech./
一場歡喜一場空 {dât xường phun hỷ dât xường hung} /to end in disappointment after high hopes given/
一夕之間 {dât chịch chi kan} /overnight/
一夜夫妻百日恩 {dât dẹ phu xê bách dật dân} /lit. once married for the first night, there are 100 days of gratitude, meaning one must treasure their partner/
一夜風流 {dât dẹ phung lầu} /one night of casual (sexual) relationship/
一天 {dât thiên} /One Day/
一天光晒 {dât thiên quong sái} /describes the feeling of finally managing to resolve the issue or problem (dark clouds on the sky– which finally disappear ) and feeling relieved again (seeing the sun which is sunny and bright again )/
一天都光晒 {dât thiên đô quong sái} /lit. the sky is well-lit, meaning things turn out all good eventually/
一夫 {dât phu} /One husband/
一夫一妻制 {dât phu dât xê chế} /Monogamy/
一夫當關 {dât phu đong quan} /lit. one man guarding the gateway, meaning one who is courageous and can fend off any troubles/
一如往昔 {dât dừ võng sich} /Like always/
一妻多夫 {dât xê đo phu} /one wife and multiple husbands, polyandry/
一妻多夫制 {dât xê đo phu chế} /Polygamy/
一姐 {dât chẻ} /The female leader/
一字之差 {dât chị chi xa} /a difference of a single word or character/
一字咁淺 {dât chị cẩm xiển} /as simple as the word "one"/
一字角 {dât chị cóc} /Corner/
一字馬 {dât chị mã} /a split (with both legs straight flat on ground)/
一官半職 {dât quôn bún chich} /A position in the government/
一定會 {dât định vỗi} /Must be/
一家大細 {dât ka đại sế} /the whole family, which includes the adults (parents and | or grandparents) and children/
一將功成萬骨枯 {dât chướng cung sình mạn quât phu} /one man succeeds ten thousand bones perish, which means a man's success is built upon scarifies of many people/
一對一 {dât đúi dât} /one on | versus one/
一小時 {dât siểu sì} /One hour/
一就一，二就二 {dât chậu dât dị chậu dị} /be decisive; hurry up (spoken)/
一局 {dât cục} /A round; A game./
一山不能藏二虎 {dât san bât nằng xòng dị phủ} /lit. a mountain cannot host two tigers, meaning there must be a winner/
一山還比一山高 {dât san vàn bỷ dât san cô} /lit. there's always a mountain higher than another, meaning there's always one with better talents/
一岩一窟 {dât ngàm dât phât} /uneven; not smooth; full of bumps and lumps/
一己之私 {dât kỷ chi si} /One's own interests/
一年 {dât niền} /One year/
一年一度 {dât niền dât độ} /once a year, annually/
一年級 {dât niền khâp} /Grade one; Primary one/
一式 {dât sich} /one set; one style/
一式兩份 {dât sich lưỡng phận} /the master document has to be with two original copies/
一弓射兩箭 {dât cung sẹ lưỡng chiến} /Kill two birds with one stone, meaning succeeding in doing two things by only one action/
一張 {dât chương} /a piece (of paper)/
一張嘢 {dât chương dẽ} /a piece of../
一往 {dât võng} /As always/
一德路 {dât đăc lộ} /name of a road in Canton city, with its subway station/
一心向上 {dât sâm hướng sượng} /wholehearted to reach high/
一忍再忍 {dât dẩn chói dẩn} /Keep bearing/
一念之間 {dât niệm chi kan} /within a moment of thought/
一息尚存 {dât sich sượng xuyền} /surviving till last breath; will not give up till the last breath/
一息間 {dât sich kan} /in an instant/
一成 {dât sình} /ten percent/
一戙都冇 {dât đụng đô mỗ} /(slang) (of gambling) to lose everything and have nothing left;to suffer a crushing defeat; to have no solutions at all/
一手一腳 {dât sẩu dât cước} /(noun) one hand and one leg; (slang) someone's own works; someone works alone; to do something from scratch/
一手交錢 {dât sẩu kao xiển} /Pay the money and receive the cargo at the same time/
一批 {dât pê} /A batch/
一技旁身 {dât kỵ pòng sân} /with a skill handy at hands/
一把 {dât bả} /bunch/
一把火 {dât bả phỏ} /burning with anger/
一拍行 {dât pách hỏng} /Two people walking side by side/
一招半式 {dât chiêu bún sich} /lit. half or part of a martial arts style, meaning one who is knowledgeable partially/
一撇嘢 {dât piết dẽ} /a stroke of a thing, which means a part of something or happening/
一撇水 {dât piết sủi} /a thousand dollars/
一擔擔 {dât đám đam} /(adjective) alike; similar; as same as; identical; two of a kind; tweedledum and tweedledee/
一支公 {dât chi cung} /a lonely man; one who is alone/
一文 {dât mần} /a dollar, usually refers a very small amount of cash or money/
一於 {dât dư} /(conjunctive adverb) decided; determined; settled on(suggestive imperative) used for suggesting that you or other people to do something or to just go with a decision, similar to saying "let's…" "in any case, let's…" | "let's just…" | "no need to hesitate, just…"/
一日 {dât dật} /(n.) a day or one day; (slang) used as part of a prepositional phrase (一日都係) to blame someone (or something or 'a reason') for some negative things that have happened, all because of; owing to; thanks to (e.g. 一日都係你 means "It's all because of you" or "Thanks to you".)/
一日到黑 {dât dật đố hăc} /all day long/
一早 {dât chổ} /earlier/
一早就 {dât chổ chậu} /early in the morning, already at the beginning/
一時 {dât sì} /suddenly; at an instant/
一時一樣 {dât sì dât dượng} /describes a person's behavior which is inconsistent and | or often changing his | her mind/
一時之間 {dât sì chi kan} /at a sudden/
一時口快 {dât sì hẩu phái} /one who said something not meant to be spoken; one who slipped with one's words/
一時時 {dât sì sì} /sometimes/
一朝 {dât chiêu} /one morning/
一朝天子一朝臣 {dât xiều thiên chỉ dât xiều sần} /lit. one reign of an emperor, one reign of officials, meaning one's subordinates or followers will tend to lose its power once the superior has fallen from power/
一朝被蛇咬 {dât chiêu bỵ sè ngão} /A burnt dog dreads the fire;once bitten, twice shy/
一本通書睇到老 {dât bủn thung sư thẩy đố lỗ} /always do things by the book; inflexible to changes or new ways of doing things/
一朵鮮花插在牛糞上 {dât đỏ siên pha xáp chọi ngầu phấn sưỡng} /lit. a fresh flower planted on a cow dung, meaning a relationship where the woman has great qualities, where the man has not, or much inferior (especially use in looks)/
一枕黃粱 {dât chẩm vòng lường} /Fond dream/
一枝公 {dât chi cung} /(slang) (a term used for a man only) alone; single/
一架 {dât ká} /classifier for plane or vehicles/
一條冷 {dât thiều lãnh} /a lonely man; one who is alone/
一條數 {dât thiều số} /one maths question | one debt or bill/
一條氣 {dât thiều hý} /non-stop; in one go (spoken)/
一梯兩伙 {dât thê lưỡng phỏ} /two apartment units per floor/
一樂也 {dât lọc dã} /a moment of joy and pleasure/
一樓一鳯 {dât lầu dât phụng} /a type of brothel where there's only one prostitute operating in one apartment unit (unlike the ones who operate in a shared flat)/
一樓一鳳 {dât lầu dât phụng} /Prostitute/
一模一樣 {dât mồ dât dượng} /identical/
一檔 {dât 檔:đỏng} /classifier for shops | first gear/
一次過 {dât xí quó} /in one go/
一步 {dât bộ} /one step/
一步一步 {dât bộ dât bộ} /Step by Step/
一死一傷 {dât sỷ dât sương} /One dead and another injured./
一死了之 {dât sỷ liễu chi} /to die and end it all, when one chooses to take his | her life, death pays all debts/
一段 {dât đuyện} /classifier for sections and relationships/
一殼眼淚 {dât hóc ngãn lụi} /feeling of sadness; literally 'a scoop of tears'/
一毛錢 {dât mồ xiền} /One dime/
一氧化碳中毒 {dât dưỡng phá thán chung đục} /Carbon Monoxide Poisoning/
一池春水 {dât xì xuân sủi} /Spring pond;quiet water/
一池秋水 {dât xì xâu sủi} /Spring pond;quiet water; Same as一池春水/
一決勝負 {dât khuyết sính phụ} /battle for victory/
一沉百踩 {dât xầm bách xải} /(metaphor) when someone is undervalued, or losses power or authority, she | he is being bullied by others/
一派 {dât pái} /One kind of; a faction/
一流 {dât lầu} /first class | world class/
一瀉千里 {dât sé xiên lỹ} /Flow down in a rushing torrent to a far distance/
一物治一物，糯米治木蝨 {dât mật chị dât mật ，nọ mễ chị mục sât} /one thing cures one thing, glutinous rice exterminates wood louse, which refers to the theory of natural enemies/
一班人 {dât ban dần} /a group of people/
一理通，百理明 {dât lỹ thung bách lỹ mình} /being able to understand one logic, reveals complete sense to hundreds of reasons or factors/
一生人 {dât săng dần} /A life time/
一番 {dât phan} /for once (spoken)/
一疋布咁長 {dât pât bố cấm xường} /long; lengthy (spoken)/
一登龍門 {dât đăng lùng mùn} /to reach one's goal/
一發 {dât phát} /classifier for bullets/
一百 {dât bách} /one hundred/
一百萬 {dât bách mạn} /one million/
一百零一 {dât bách lình dât} /One hundred and one;101/
一皮 {dât pỳ} /ten thousand dollars/
一皮嘢 {dât pỳ dẽ} /ten thousand dollars/
一盅兩件 {dât chung lưỡng kiện} /the slang for 'to eat dim sum' (a common Chinese cuisine); a cup of tea and 2 pieces of dim sum; minimum order; minimum purchase/
一盤水 {dât pùn sủi} /a tray of water, a lot of money or ten thousand dollar/
一直行 {dât chịch hành} /keep walking, keep walking straight/
一眼睇晒 {dât ngãn thẩy sái} /seen all at one glance/
一眼關七 {dât ngãn quan xât} /(adj.) to be aware of everything happening at the moment; to be on alert, multitasking/
一眾 {dât chúng} /one type | everyone; whole group/
一碌杉 {dât luc xám} /lit. a piece of log, meaning one who is inflexible, stiff, awkward or non-responsive, especially while one is standing still/
一碗 {dât vủn} /a bowl of something/
一碟齋 {dât điệp chai} /a mess/
一磚豆腐想升仙 {dât chuyên đậu 2 phụ sưởng sinh siên} /(Sarcasm) When someone thinks he | she knows everything by knowing just a part of it/
一萬 {dât mạn} /ten thousand/
一窿蛇 {dât lùng sè} /a group of bad guys/
一站式 {dât chạm sich} /One-stop (service)/
一端 {dât đuyên} /at one end of/
一竹篙打一船人 {dât chuc cô đả dât suyền dần} /a pole hits a boat of people, which means one holds onto someone's wrong and thinks the rest of others are the same/
一竹篙打死一船人 {dât chuc cô đả sỷ dât suyền dần} /a pole hits and kills a boat of people, which means one holds onto someone's wrong and thinks the rest of others are the same/
一竹篙揇沉一船人 {dât chuc cô nãm xầm dât suyền dần} /Tar with the same bush, meaning to believe wrongly that someone or something has the same bad qualities as someone or something that is similar/
一筆還一筆 {dât bât vàn dât bât} /one account apart from one account, it means to separate one event from another instead of combining them together/
一等兵 {dât đẳng binh} /private first class (military)/
一箭雙雕 {dât chiến sương điêu} /kill two birds with one stone; achieve two things at one stroke; serve double purpose (idiom)/
一箸夾中 {dât chự káp chung} /a person who has an accurate guess in the first attempt/
一粒嘢 {dât lâp dẽ} /classifier of extremely small item (ie dust, rice, mole, raindrops etc)/
一粒神 {dât nâp sần} /one cent coin/
一粒花 {dât nâp pha} /probationary police inspector, who has a star on the badge/
一統天下 {dât thủng thiên hạ} /unify the country/
一經 {dât kinh} /as soon as, once/
一群 {dât khuần} /a group/
一而再 {dât dì chói} /Again and again/
一肚氣 {dât thỗ hý} /a belly full of air, it is used to describe a person being very angry and annoyed/
一脈相傳 {dât mặc sương xuyền} /a custom, idea or thing passed down from generation to generation within the family/
一腳牛屎 {dât cước ngầu sỉ} /a foot covered in cow dung, it is used to describe a person getting himself | herself in big trouble which is hard to get out of/
一腳踏兩船 {dât cước đạp lưỡng suyền} /two-timing (slang)/
一腳踢 {dât cước thếc} /(slang) to describe someone who handles all the tasks for a project or a business/
一自 {dât chị} /as soon as; one side; do this and that at the same time/
一舉成名 {dât củi sình mình} /lit. one passed imperial examinations and make fame, meaning one who make fame in an instant/
一舊飯 {dât cậu phạn} /lit. one lump of rice, meaning one who is not responsive or stupid/
一色 {dât sich} /same colour; same tone; identical/
一草 {dât xổ} /ten dollars/
一處 {dât xứ} /a place/
一表人才 {dât biểu dần xòi} /refers a person looking outstanding/
一見鍾情 {dât kiến chung xình} /to be deeply in love with something | someone right away after the first glance | sight/
一覽表 {dât lãm biểu} /summary in the form of a chart/
一言以蔽 {dât diền dĩ bế} /In a word/
一言堂 {dât diền thòng} /it is used to describe a person not listening to others, and who is undemocratic, a dictator/
一講曹操，曹操就到 {dât cỏng xồ xô xồ xô chậu đố} /speaking of the devil and he shall appear, when something | someone being discussed appear unexpectedly/
一路上 {dât lộ sượng} /on the road, all the way/
一路路 {dât lộ lộ} /gradually/
一身債 {dât sân chái} /one with lot of debts/
一身蟻 {dât sân ngễ} /(slang) to describe someone who is in serious trouble | predicament or difficulty/
一身鬆 {dât sân sung} /one relieved from stress/
一輪嘴 {dât luẩn chủi} /the act of telling or asking something impatiently (no pause in between words)/
一轆木 {dât luc mục} /to describe someone sluggish, or slow on thought and action/
一轆木噉 {dât luc mục cẩm} /to describe someone sluggish, or slow on thought and action/
一轆杉 {dât luc xám} /one who stand motionless or straight/
一邊倒 {dât biên đổ} /leaning to the majority/
一部 {dât bộ} /Radical 1, a thing, usually used with object or thing like cellphone or movie/
一部份 {dât bộ phận} /A part/
一醉解千愁 {dât chúi kải xiên sầu} /Get drunk to escape from reality/
一鑊 {dât vọc} /lit. a wok, meaning at once/
一鑊泡 {dât vọc pỗ} /(slang) in a chaotic state; a plight of; in a mess/
一鑊熟 {dât vọc sục} /(slang) utterly destroyed; nothing survives; all go down together; to finish someting in one stroke; to make a clean sweep/
一鑊粥 {dât vọc chuc} /make a mess of (slang)/
一鑊繑起 {dât vọc khiễu hỷ} /to betray one unexpectedly/
一門 {dât mùn} /classifier for courses/
